goal: Design a clear hand size cap and discard mechanism for battleV2, including recommended parameters, UX flow, and implementation-ready rules.
constraints: Planning first: do not change runtime gameplay logic in this task.
Design must align with existing battleV2 round flow and terminology.
Must include player-side and AI-side discard behavior.
Must define timeout fallback behavior to prevent deadlock.
deliverables: A planning document under docs/battle with recommended hand cap and discard rules.
A short implementation checklist with target files and sequencing.
